title: Shipwright Fast Analysis Output
description: Output schema for Fast Mode single-pass analysis. Does not include debate harness fields (rubric_scores, decisive_dimension, side_summaries, etc.). Those belong to Rigor Mode.

recommendation.description: A concise, direct statement of the recommended direction. Free-form string, not locked to side_a/side_b labels.

confidence_band.description: Internal routing band. High = above routing threshold, medium = below threshold, low = well below threshold. Not a calibrated statistical probability.

needs_human_review.description: True if the scenario contains ambiguity, missing evidence, or sensitivity that warrants human judgment before acting.

summary.description: A 1-2 sentence summary of the core reasoning behind the recommendation.

uncertainty_payload.description: Present when confidence_band is medium or low, or when needs_human_review is true. This is the primary output in unresolved cases, not a secondary explanation.

uncertainty_drivers.description: Concrete reasons the recommendation is uncertain or should not be acted on without more information.

disambiguation_questions.description: The most important questions that would resolve the uncertainty.

needed_evidence.description: Specific evidence that would raise confidence in the recommendation.

recommended_next_action.description: The single most important next step to take before acting on this recommendation.
